diagrams.title: Operating System Layers with System Programs
diagrams.description: Shows the hierarchical structure of operating system from hardware to user applications
elements: OPERATING SYSTEM KERNEL (CPU scheduling, Memory management, File system)
SYSTEM PROGRAMS (File management, Disk utilities, Compilers, Shell, Device drivers)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding where system programs fit in OS architecture and their relationship with kernel and applications

diagrams.title: Boot Process Flowchart
diagrams.description: Step-by-step flow of computer boot process from power on to ready state
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the sequential process of system startup and role of bootstrap program

diagrams.title: System Call Interface Flow
diagrams.description: Shows how user programs interact with OS through system calls and system programs
elements: SYSTEM CALL INTERFACE (open, read, write, close)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the path from user request to hardware operation through system programs and calls
